children.text: as distressed counties, counties in the region that are the most severely and persistently distressed and underdeveloped and have high rates of poverty, unemployment, or outmigration;
as nondistressed counties, counties in the region that are not designated as distressed counties under paragraph (1); and
as isolated areas of distress, areas located in nondistressed counties (as designated under paragraph (2)) that have high rates of poverty, unemployment, or outmigration.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Authority shall allocate at least 50 percent of the appropriations made available under for programs and projects designed to serve the needs of distressed counties and isolated areas of distress in the region.section 2009bb–12 of this title

children.heading: Funding limitations
children.label: 2 Funding limitations
children.text: The funding limitations under shall not apply to a project to provide transportation or telecommunication or basic public services to residents of 1 or more distressed counties or isolated areas of distress in the region.section 2009bb–3(b) of this title

children.heading: Transportation, telecommunication, renewable energy, and basic public infrastructure
children.label: c Transportation, telecommunication, renewable energy, and basic public infrastructure
children.text: The Authority shall allocate at least 50 percent of any funds made available under for transportation, telecommunication, renewable energy, and basic public infrastructure projects authorized under paragraphs (1) and (3) of .section 2009bb–12 of this titlesection 2009bb–2(a) of this title
